title: --markdown flag uses text_to_html instead of markdown_to_html
description: In cli.rs, the Post command with --markdown reads stdin but passes content through post::text_to_html() which just wraps in paragraph tags. Should use sanitize::markdown_to_html() to render markdown via pulldown-cmark then sanitize with ammonia.
close_reason: All quick fixes applied: markdown rendering, feed dedup, rate limiter wired in, error logging, shared HTTP client, clippy+rustfmt clean
